Number Input

Source: Figma Number_Input_Base (2745:2199). Numeric field with integrated +/- stepper (lt-prop-controls="true" → Input_Number_Stepper). P2 Regular, h-36, radius R(6). Eight states.

States (Number_Input_Base)
StatePreview
Default
Hover
Active (focused)
Filled
Disabled
Disabled After
Error
Success
Full field (Number_Input_Base)
